extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: for matters against the company, I counted 1 criminal and 3 tax proceedings and no statutory/regulatory proceedings; against subsidiaries, all categories are Nil; against directors, I counted 3 criminal proceedings but excluded their 9 tax proceedings from the company/subsidiary tax count; against promoters, I counted 3 criminal proceedings but excluded their 4 tax proceedings. Thus, criminal proceedings against all listed entities total 7, regulatory actions against all listed entities total 0, and tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries total 3; all “By” rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the company is ₹50.23 million, while the subsidiaries’ against amount is Nil, giving ₹50.23 million = ₹5.023 crore; director and promoter amounts and all “By” amounts were excluded. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹7.07 million as of September 30, 2024, with subsidiary totals shown as zero, converting to ₹0.707 crore; no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed, although segment/geographic and other concentration percentages appear. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
